differences.title: 1. DEVELOPMENT SERVER
differences.leftDesc: Uses native ES modules for instant cold starts and fast HMR.
differences.rightDesc: Bundles code upfront, leading to slower initial server starts.

differences.title: 2. BUILD SPEED
differences.leftDesc: Leverages esbuild for initial builds, significantly faster than Webpack.
differences.rightDesc: Relies on plugins and loaders, can be time-consuming for large projects.

differences.title: 3. CONFIGURATION
differences.leftDesc: Opinionated defaults, requires little to no configuration for common use cases.
differences.rightDesc: Highly customizable but complex, often requiring significant setup.

differences.title: 4. PLUGINS & LOADERS
differences.leftDesc: Uses Rollup-compatible plugins, streamlined plugin system.
differences.rightDesc: Vast ecosystem of loaders and plugins, but can lead to version conflicts.

differences.title: 5. HOT MODULE REPLACEMENT
differences.leftDesc: Extremely fast HMR updates due to native ESM.
differences.rightDesc: Generally reliable HMR, but can be slower depending on configuration.

differences.title: 6. COMMUNITY SUPPORT
differences.rightDesc: Well-established and widely used with extensive documentation.

differences.title: 7. PERFORMANCE FOCUS
differences.leftDesc: Prioritizes lightning-fast development server and HMR.
differences.rightDesc: Historically focused on highly optimized production bundles.
